quick_self_check_subtitle: A quick self-check for your teeth and oral cavity.
check_teeth_description: Check for cavities, broken teeth and discoloration.
check_oral_cavity: Check my Oral Cavity (Tongue, Lips & Gums)
check_oral_cavity_description: Check for ulcers, swelling, bleeding gums and sores.
scan_setup_instruction_1: 1. Ensure good lighting for a clear picture.
scan_setup_instruction_2: 2. Align your teeth/mouth within the guidelines.
scan_setup_instruction_3: 3. Hold the phone steady for 3 seconds.
loading_subtitle: Please wait while our AI model generates your oral health report.
dental_care_quote: Good dental hygiene prevents more than just toothaches – it protects your overall health.
about_us_body_1: Oral Sure is a simple and smart mobile app that helps you check your oral health anytime, anywhere. By taking a quick selfie of your mouth and answering a few short questions, you can get a fast and easy assessment of your oral health condition.
about_us_body_2: The app provides clear results, highlights possible risks, and gives you helpful recommendations on whether you should visit a dentist. Developed in collaboration with the Government Dental College, Oral Sure aims to raise awareness, encourage early detection of dental issues, and guide people toward better oral health and timely professional care.
